summary: Income support scheme for eligible farmer families across India.
description: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to eligible farmer families. Useful for small and marginal farmers.
eligibility: Applicable to eligible landholding farmer families across India. Exclusions apply for institutional landholders and certain income tax payers.
application_process: Apply through PM-KISAN portal, CSC centers, or state nodal officers.

summary: Affordable housing mission for urban beneficiaries.
description: Supports eligible urban households with affordable housing assistance, credit linked subsidy, and beneficiary-led construction support.
eligibility: Intended for eligible urban households, especially EWS, LIG and MIG categories based on applicable norms.
application_process: Apply through state urban development systems or official PMAY Urban channels.

summary: Health insurance support for persons with certain disabilities.
description: Provides affordable health insurance coverage for persons with autism, cerebral palsy, mental retardation and multiple disabilities under the National Trust framework.
eligibility: For persons with specified disabilities registered under National Trust requirements.
application_process: Apply via registered organizations or authorized channels under the National Trust ecosystem.
